## Next Batch — Generated by Coach (2026-06-23)

> These tasks were auto-generated by the Coach after backlog health check: 0 remaining tasks, stalled loop detected.

### Task: fix-deploy-stale-process-cleanup
- **Description**: The polytopia site (hex.codeovertcp.com) has TWO processes serving on port 3001: the systemd `polytopia-clone.service` running `vite preview` (alive but not serving) and a stale `serve dist -p 3001 --cors` that grabbed the port first. Create a deploy script that: (1) kills any existing processes on port 3001 before starting, (2) rebuilds with `npm run build`, (3) restarts via `systemctl --user restart polytopia-clone`, (4) verifies the systemd service is the sole process serving.
- **Success criteria**:
  - `ss -tlnp | grep 3001` shows exactly one node process (the systemd service) after deploy
  - `systemctl --user status polytopia-clone` shows active after deploy
  - Running deploy twice is idempotent
- **Coach checks**:
  - Run `ss -tlnp | grep 3001` — verify single process
  - Run deploy script — verify clean restart
  - Kill the service — verify site goes down, then restart — verify site comes back

### Task: gdd-3.5-cloak-infiltration-dagger
- **Description**: Implement Cloak Infiltration per GDD §3.5. After a Cloak unit spends one full turn submerged adjacent to an enemy city, it gains the Infiltrate action. Using Infiltrate spawns a Dagger unit (3HP, 2atk, 1def, 1mov) inside the enemy city on the next turn. Dagger can attack immediately upon spawning. Requires Cloak unit + Diplomacy tech (8⭐). Exclude naval and Giant units from being infiltrated.
- **Success criteria**:
  - Cloak submerged 1 turn adjacent to enemy city shows Infiltrate action
  - Dagger spawns inside city with 3HP/2atk/1def
  - Dagger can attack on spawn turn
  - Cannot infiltrate without Diplomacy tech
  - 3+ new tests for infiltration flow
- **Coach checks**:
  - Build Cloak, move next to enemy city, submerge, end turn, verify Infiltrate button
  - Use Infiltrate, verify Dagger spawns next turn inside city
  - Attack with Dagger on spawn turn
  - Run `npx vitest run` — all tests pass

### Task: gdd-9-fix-park-scoring-status
- **Description**: The GDD.md §9 gaps section lists Park scoring as `[ ]` but it's already implemented in `calcScore()` (hasPark = +250 score). Change the `[ ]` to `[x]` and add a note confirming implementation. Also verify no other features incorrectly marked as missing.
- **Success criteria**:
  - `grep "Park scoring" GDD.md` shows `[x]` not `[ ]`
  - Verify Park score is included in Perfection mode final score
  - No other `[ ]` items are actually implemented
- **Coach checks**:
  - Check calcScore() has parkScoring with Park building
  - Build Park in city, end game, verify +250 in score
  - Run tests — all pass
